name: Aim
description: Focus and take a precise shot.

name: Apply Poison
description: Coat your weapon with poison.

name: Apply Stun Effect
description: Coat your weapon with a stunning agent.

name: Basic Attack
description: A fundamental melee attack. The foundation of all combat.

name: Block
description: Raise your guard to reduce incoming damage.

name: All Stats Buff
description: Increase all attributes.

name: Defense Buff
description: Increase armor and damage resistance.

name: Loot Rate Buff
description: Increase the chance of finding rare items.

name: Speed Buff
description: Increase attack speed and evasion.

name: Strength Buff
description: Increase conviction and damage output.

name: Chill
description: Freeze enemies with cold magic.

name: Climb
description: Climb a surface to reach new areas.

name: Deploy Caltrops
description: Deploy caltrops to damage enemies.

name: Deploy Stun Trap
description: Deploy a trap that stuns enemies.

name: First Aid
description: Apply basic medical treatment to restore health.

name: Focus
description: Concentrate your power for enhanced effectiveness.

name: Footwork
description: Move with agility to evade attacks.

name: Grant Skill Point
description: Grant a skill point to improve abilities.

name: Major Heal
description: Restore a large amount of health.

name: Light Area
description: Illuminate the surrounding area.

name: Misdirect
description: Confuse your enemies with feints and misdirection.

name: Bleed
description: Cause the target to bleed, dealing damage over time.

name: Burn
description: Inflict a burning effect on the target.

name: Burn (AOE)
description: Burn all nearby enemies.

name: Chill
description: Slow the target with a chilling effect.

name: Chill (AOE)
description: Chill all nearby enemies.

name: Chime
description: Ring out with a protective sound.

name: Disorient
description: Disorient the target, reducing their accuracy.

name: Echo
description: Amplify the effect of the next spell.

name: Fade
description: Reduce damage taken temporarily.

name: Harmony
description: Restore balance to the group.

name: Holy Light
description: Heal with divine light.

name: Lullaby
description: Soothe the target with a calming effect.

name: Melody
description: Enhance harmony through song.

name: Poison
description: Poison the target, dealing damage over time.

name: Resonance
description: Amplify effects across multiple targets.

name: Shock
description: Stun the target with electrical damage.

name: Silence
description: Silence the target, preventing spell casting.

name: Stealth
description: Become harder to hit.

name: Stun
description: Stun the target, preventing their next action.

name: Stun (AOE)
description: Stun all nearby enemies.

name: Whisper
description: A subtle enchantment effect.

name: Produce Flame
description: Generate a flame to damage enemies.

name: Rest
description: Take a moment to catch your breath and recover.

name: Major Mana Restoration
description: Restore a large amount of mana.

name: Minor Mana Restoration
description: Restore a small amount of mana.

name: Minor Stamina Restoration
description: Restore a moderate amount of stamina.

name: Small Stamina Restoration
description: Restore a small amount of stamina.

name: Reveal Area
description: Reveal hidden items and passages.

name: Sense
description: Heighten your awareness to detect danger.

name: Shock
description: Strike with electrical energy.

name: Shout
description: Rally your allies with a powerful cry.

name: Shove
description: Push an enemy back with force.

name: Fireball
description: Launch a ball of fire at all enemies.

name: Lightning Strike
description: Strike a target with lightning.

name: Resurrect
description: Bring an ally back to life.

name: Mass Resurrect
description: Bring all defeated allies back to life.

name: Teleport
description: Teleport to a random location.

name: Safe Teleport
description: Teleport to a known safe location.

name: Throw Knife
description: Throw a knife at an enemy.

name: Unlock Door
description: Unlock a locked door or chest.

name: Use Escape Rope
description: Use a rope to escape from danger.

name: Use Health Potion
description: Drink a health potion to restore HP.

name: Use Health Potion
description: Drink a health potion to restore HP.

name: Use Mana Potion
description: Drink a mana potion to restore mana.

name: Use Mana Potion
description: Drink a mana potion to restore mana.

name: Use Smoke Bomb
description: Use a smoke bomb to escape from danger.

name: Use Stamina Potion
description: Drink a stamina potion to restore stamina.

name: Desperate Attack
description: A reckless, exhausting attack made when all other options are spent. Leaves you vulnerable.

name: Catch Breath
description: Sacrifice a turn to desperately recover stamina, but leave your defenses cracked.

name: Mental Fog
description: Mana depletion causes severe confusion and disorientation. You stumble blindly.

name: Wild Flail
description: Swing wildly with no technique. High variance, low accuracy, but might hit hard.

name: Last Stand
description: Draw upon remaining life force to generate energy. Restores resources but damages and curses you.

name: Lunge
description: Commit forward with explosive force, closing distance in an instant.

name: Haymaker
description: A wild overhand swing. High risk, brutal impact.

name: Weak Point
description: Study and exploit a gap in the target's guard.

name: Skirmish
description: Strike and reposition in one fluid motion.

name: Thunderclap
description: A concussive electric burst that rattles bone and mind.

name: Frost Slide
description: Ride a lance of ice across the ground into the target.

name: Scorched Shot
description: A precise strike that leaves the wound burning.

name: Sleet
description: Electrified ice shards that slow and shock simultaneously.

name: Singe
description: A melee strike charged with heat. The wound smolders.

name: Frostbite
description: A chilling strike that seeps cold into the target's limbs.

name: Warcry
description: A rallying cry that sharpens the fighting spirit of all allies.

name: Mend
description: A focused treatment that draws on both skill and reagent to close wounds properly.
